top_signals.title: Hostile states behind three-quarters of attacks on Britain's critical infrastructure, cyber chief warns
top_signals.summary: NCSC CEO Richard Horne warned that “kinetic targeting in any conflict tomorrow will be based on intelligence gathered today” and that nation-state adversaries were “prepositioning” throughout British critical infrastructure.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: U.S. Navy ends blockade of Iran's ports and coastal areas, CENTCOM says
top_signals.summary: The Navy on Thursday lifted its blockade of Iran's ports and coastal areas at the direction of President Donald Trump.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Jefferies expects IREN’s AI cloud business to outpace data center leasing, sees 30% upside
top_signals.summary: Jefferies estimates that only about 10% of IREN's roughly 6 gigawatt global power portfolio is being utilized.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: First Phosphate lines up LOIs, offtake deals for Quebec projects at G7 Summit
top_signals.summary: The company has two projects in the Saguenay-Lac-St-Jean region.
